pattern: The warm-up that just exercises returning a computed scalar: combine two integers and hand back the result.
hints: The whole task is a single arithmetic operation on the two inputs.
No loop, no data structure - just produce one number from the two given ones.

edge_inputs.description: adding zero leaves the other unchanged

stress.description: random pairs across the full allowed range
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    a = rng.randint(-100, 100)
    b = rng.randint(-100, 100)
    return [a, b]
